basics.name: Enoch Agyemang Twumasi
basics.label:
Software Engineer,
Systems Architect, and Technical Operator
basics.summary:
Software engineer, systems architect, and technical operator with a
deep understanding of both low-level computing invariants and modern full-stack
execution. Bridges the gap between underlying engine architecture (V8 internals,
memory management, OS primitives) and high-level product delivery (Next.js 16+,
React 19, TypeScript). Highly adaptable and academically rigorous, with dual
science degrees and a proven track record of architecting digital
infrastructure, automating complex business logic, and executing in demanding
real-world operational environments.

work.name: First and Last
work.summary:
Independent engineering
consultancy specializing in high-performance web architecture, custom functional
ecosystems, interactive logic tools, and business automation.
highlights:
Architected flagship Next.js platform utilizing React Server Components,
achieving perfect Core Web Vitals (100s in Performance, Accessibility, Best
Practices, and SEO).

Engineered a centralized seo.ts infrastructure and
dynamic structured data pipeline, automatically injecting programmatic metadata
and generating dynamic sitemaps.

Developed a scalable MDX-based architecture
to programmatically parse and render a 32-page technical blog.

Implemented
robust, privacy-compliant user analytics alongside a custom cookie and
consent-management system.

Developed deterministic, client-side pricing
calculators to automatically qualify inbound traffic and algorithmically model
optimal service pricing.

Engineered 'FALM OS,' a relational operational
infrastructure utilizing custom-designed database backends to manage complex
business logic and project lifecycles.

Standardized a production-grade tech
stack focused on server-first rendering and near-instant Time to First Byte
(TTFB).

Designed an immutable enterprise email architecture isolating
reputation boundaries to ensure 100% deliverability.

Built a centralized
security vault with OS-level logic for managing API keys and service
credentials.

Implemented deterministic Grounded AI systems utilizing
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Next.js Route Handlers to integrate
LLMs into live business environments without data leaks or hallucination.

Built and managed omnichannel business presence across Google Business Profile,
Apple Business, Bing Places, Clutch, Product Hunt, and 6 distinct social media
platforms.

Produced, shot, and edited professional commercial video assets to
drive brand authority.

work.name: Indian Summer Pool
work.summary:
Domain consultant and technician for commercial and residential pool
systems.
highlights:
Executed complex physical installations,
maintenance, and plumbing repairs on filtration systems.

Ensured precise
chemical balancing and strict safety compliance in operational environments.

Leveraged deep domain knowledge acquired in the field to accurately scope,
design, and architect the company's digital infrastructure and local search
ecosystem.

work.name: Missouri University of Science and Technology
work.summary: Technical instructor at the Kummer Center for STEM Education.
highlights:
Delivered technical instruction and engaging STEM experiences
to K-12 students, breaking down complex scientific and engineering concepts.

Managed and maintained technical inventory, organizing operational logistics
for Project Lead The Way (PLTW) events.

work.name:
Tekniplex & Healthcare
Services
work.position: Industrial Machine Operator & Clinical Care Aide
work.summary:
Dual operational role spanning industrial
manufacturing and dedicated clinical healthcare.
highlights:
Operated,
maintained, and troubleshooted advanced mechanical and digital manufacturing
equipment.

Conducted routine hardware inspections to minimize downtime and
uphold rigid safety and quality standards.

Provided dedicated healthcare
support to high-needs patients (including Dementia care), maintaining strict
medical protocols in sensitive environments.

work.name:

University of Science and Technology
work.position:

Health Team Member
work.summary:
Clinical and rural
healthcare operational support.
highlights:
Managed patient intake,
reporting, and billing for clinical CT procedures within the university
Radiology Department.

Deployed with the GNAAS Health Team to provide
secondary healthcare services, emergency first aid, and OTC administration to
underserved rural communities.

work.name: National Seminars
work.summary:
Technical operator for
nationwide live broadcasting.
highlights:
Executed live, nationwide
streaming for large-scale seminar events.

Managed advanced Audio/Visual
hardware, ensuring zero-downtime broadcasting and high-fidelity video/audio
routing.

work.name: Missouri S&T University Police Dept.
work.summary:
Security
liaison and campus safety operator.
highlights:
Operated as a secure
liaison between the student body and university police.

Patrolled campus
infrastructure, monitored secure access points, and enforced safety protocols
with a high degree of situational awareness.

work.name:
Healthy Planet /
Wellness Wagon
work.summary: Operational lead for stock and delivery tracking.
highlights:
Managed
accurate inventory tracking, dynamic stock replenishment, and order staging.

Maintained detailed delivery logs and executed secure, timely B2B and B2C
logistics operations.

projects.name:

Pools Web Architecture
projects.description:
Architected a polished, SEO-tight
digital platform utilizing structured data and semantic HTML to map entity
relationships.
highlights:
Achieved 97+ Performance and 100 SEO Core Web
Vitals.
Secured a #1 local search ranking within 30 days of launch.

projects.name: Royal Blue Bullies Lead-Generation Engine
projects.description:
Built a
high-performance web platform and automated client education engine.
highlights:
Achieved perfect 100 SEO and Accessibility scores on PageSpeed
Insights.

Automated client education via interactive logic tools,
generating 40-50 verified daily leads.

Drove total inventory sell-out
within 72 hours of deployment.

projects.name: RBAC-Enforced Career Platform
projects.description:
Engineered a secure, role-based application for enterprise
recruitment.
highlights:
Implemented complex state modeling, multi-tenant
data isolation, and server-side mutations.

Utilized React Actions to enforce
strict permission boundaries.
